objection_triggers.signal: Uses TOSCA, Katalon, Testim, or mabl
objection_triggers.response: Totally fair. A lot of teams we work with had [tool] too. The gap they kept hitting was [specific limitation]. Worth comparing?
objection_triggers.note: Check memory/competitors/ for tool-specific response instead of this generic one.

objection_triggers.response: We offer on-prem, private cloud, and hybrid. SOC2/ISO certified. A few Fortune 500s run us behind their firewall.
That's actually why teams like yours use us. Plain English means devs write tests without a dedicated QA team.
Makes sense. A lot of QA leaders in their first 90 days use our free trial to benchmark what's possible before committing.
We work with Sanofi, Oscar Health, and several banks. Happy to walk through our compliance story.
Totally get it. One company your size (Spendflo) cut manual testing 50% and saw ROI in the first quarter.

rules: Assign ONE predicted objection per prospect (the most likely one based on research).
If a known competitor tool is detected, check the battle card in memory/competitors/ for a tool-specific response.
If no clear signal, default to 'We already have a tool' since it's the most common objection.
